ValidationRule.description: Prevents backward status transitions that would corrupt Dynatrace state-machine flow metrics. Forward-only path: Submitted → Processing → Underwriting → Approved or Denied.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISNEW()), OR( AND( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Submitted'), OR( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), 'Processing'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), 'Underwriting'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), 'Approved'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), 'Denied') ) ), AND( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Processing'), OR( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), 'Underwriting'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), 'Approved'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), 'Denied') ) ), AND( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Underwriting'), OR( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), 'Approved'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), 'Denied') ) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Status cannot be moved backward. Valid transitions: Submitted → Processing → Underwriting → Approved or Denied.
